zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippe de Dammartin於大約1214年出生在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾時，她的父親Simon de Dammartin35歲，母親Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil16歲。她於大約1239年與Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes結婚。她去世於1278年4月14日在荷蘭蓋爾德藍德享年65歲，埋葬在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福高。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippe de Dammartin于大约1214年出生在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利奧馬爾时，她的父亲Simon de Dammartin35岁，母亲Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil16岁。她于大约1239年与Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes结婚。她去世于1278年4月14日在荷兰蓋爾德藍德享年65岁，埋葬在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福高。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Philippe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Philip
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philippe de Dammartin was born about 1214, in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France, her father, Simon de Dammartin, was 35 and her mother, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, was 16. She married Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes about 1239. She died on 14 April 1278, in Zutphen, Gelderland, Netherlands, at the age of 65, and was buried in Goch, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippe de Dammartin est née environ 1214, à Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France, son père, Simon de Dammartin, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes environ 1239. Elle est décédée le 14 avril 1278, à Zutphen, Gueldre, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippe de Dammartin um 1214 in Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon de Dammartin 35 und ihre Mutter Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil 16. Sie hat um 1239 Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes geheiratet. Sie starb am 14. April 1278 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Zutphen, Geldern, Niederlande und wurde in Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Dammartin è nata il circa 1214 nel Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Simon de Dammartin, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes circa 1239. Morì il 14 aprile 1278, nel Zutphen, Gelderland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippe de Dammartinが約1214年にフランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメアウマルで生まれた時，父Simon de Dammartinは35歳，母Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuilは16歳であった。約1239年にRaoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînesと結婚した。彼女は1278年4月14日にオランダジェルダーランドズトフンで65歳で死去し，ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブゴチにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippe de Dammartin(이)가 대략 1214년 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 오마일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Dammartin(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1239년 Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1278년 4월 14일 네덜란드 글델랜드 주트프에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 고치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippe de Dammartin nasceu aproximadamente 1214, em Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França, seu pai, Simon de Dammartin, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes aproximadamente 1239. Ela faleceu em 14 de abril de 1278, em Zutphen, Gheldria, Países Baixos, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippe de Dammartin родилась около 1214 г. в местности аумеил, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Simon de Dammartin было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes около 1239 г. Она умерла 14 апреля 1278 г. в местности зутфен, джелдирланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности гоч, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippe de Dammartin nació aproximadamente 1214, en Aumale, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Simon de Dammartin, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Marie de Ponthieu, Countess of Montreuil, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Raoul de Lusignan II de Lusignan, Count of Eu and Guînes aproximadamente 1239. Murió el 14 de abril de 1278, en Zutphen, Gelderland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Goch, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania.
